title: derris tonkinensis
intro: Derris tonkinensis, also known as the Tonkin bean or Locust bean, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's roots and seeds contain rotenone, a toxic compound that has been used as a natural insecticide, and have been used to treat snake bites, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Derris tonkinensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
